OKBrain

Site summary:
OKBrain is a simple static website with a Markdown-powered blog about using AI while retaining ownership of your stack and publishing workflow.

Key routes:
Home: /
Blog index: /blog
Featured post: /blog/own-your-ai-stack

Content notes:
- Blog posts are written in Markdown.
- Markdown supports tables and images.
- Pages are statically generated with Next.js.
- Navigation includes Home and Blog links in the header and footer.
